custom_action.description:
动作名

支持的自定义动作：

1. Count - 计数器动作，达到目标次数后执行指定节点

2. Countdown - 倒计时动作，在限定时间内循环识别并执行节点

3. OperationRecordAction - 操作录制动作，按顺序执行一系列操作

4. IfElse - 条件分支动作，根据识别结果的 detail.hit 字段分支执行

示例（当 custom_action 为各值时对应的 custom_action_param）：

Count:
{
    "count": 0,
    "target_count": 3,
    "next_node": ["node_name"],
    "else_node": ["node_name"],
    "reset_node": ["node_name"],
    "logger": false
}

Countdown:
{
    "total_time": 90,
    "Interrupt": ["A1", {"name": "A2", "run": true, "interval": 2, "max_reco": 3}],
    "Continue": [{"name": "B", "run": 1, "interval": 3, "delay": 2}],
    "Over": "C"
}

OperationRecordAction:
{
    "operations": [
        {"action": "move", "params": {"direction": "forward", "duration": 2.0}},
        {"action": "jump", "params": {}},
        {"action": "turn", "params": {"angle": 90.0}},
        {"action": "wait", "params": {"duration": 1.0}}
    ],
    "loop_count": 1
}

IfElse:
{
    "true": {"items": [{"action": "Click", "param": {"target": true}}], "next": ["NextStep1"]},
    "false": {"items": ["HandleNoMatch"], "next": ["NextStep2"]}
}
